title: Identifying Implicit Social Biases in Vision-Language Models

title: Mapping Bias in Vision Language Models: Signposts Pitfalls and the Road Ahead
reason_for_rejection: Useful VLM fairness background but not directly tied to GeoDE Dollar Street or object-region metrics

reason_for_rejection: Demographic VLM fairness focus; weak connection to regional object recognition

title: Locating Demographic Bias at the Attention-Head Level in CLIP's Vision Encoder
reason_for_rejection: Mechanistic demographic-bias audit is too narrow for this paper's regional benchmark focus

title: Auditing and Mitigating Bias in Gender Classification Algorithms: A Data-Centric Approach
reason_for_rejection: Face/gender classification paper with weak connection to regional object recognition

title: Spoken ObjectNet: A Bias-Controlled Spoken Caption Dataset
reason_for_rejection: Audio-visual captioning benchmark is adjacent but not needed for this paper's image-classification argument
